query:
ALTER TABLE blog_posts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS coverImageUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS authorId INT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS metaTitle VARCHAR(160),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS metaDescription VARCHAR(320),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS focusKeyword VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS secondaryKeywords JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS readingTimeMinutes INT DEFAULT 5,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS aiGenerated BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

-- Rename columns to match Drizzle schema column names
ALTER TABLE blog_posts 
  CHANGE COLUMN title blog_title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN content blog_content LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN status blog_status ENUM('draft','published','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  CHANGE COLUMN createdAt blog_createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CHANGE COLUMN updatedAt blog_updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CHANGE COLUMN aiGenerated blog_aiGenerated BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

  CHANGE COLUMN updatedAt blog_updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CHANGE COLUMN aiGenerated blog_aiGenerated BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
